opinion.h: UNITED STATES, Appellant, v. MELVEN BOOTH,1 Administrator, etc. No. 192.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. George A. King for appellee.
Dismissed on motion of counsel for the appellant.

f.p: Death of Olin R. Booth suggested, and appearance of Melven Booth, as administrator of Olin R. Booth, deceased, as the party appellee herein, filed and entered on January 10, 1916.[ U S v. Booth 241 U.S. 683 (1916) ]
